$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

configVersion.description: Agent Black Box config format version.

sessionDir.description: Directory where session reports are written. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root.

exclude.description: Repository-relative paths or path segments ignored by watching and reporting.

riskPatterns.description: Repository-relative paths or path segments treated as review-sensitive.

maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum changed file size scanned for possible secret-like values.
